headline: How Weyerhaeuser's New Cash-Return Framework Could Reshape WY Investors' Total-Return Expectations
summary: Earlier this year, Weyerhaeuser’s board declared a quarterly base cash dividend of US$0.21 per share, payable on June 22, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 5, 2026. The company also outlined a plan to return 75 to 80 percent of annual Adjusted Funds Available for Distribution through a mix of base dividends, potential supplemental dividends, and opportunistic share repurchases, highlighting a clearer framework for returning cash to investors. Now we’ll examine how this commitment to...

headline: Weyerhaeuser Company Declares Dividend on Common Shares
summary: Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE: WY) today announced that its board of directors declared a quarterly base cash dividend of $0.21 per share on the common stock of the company, payable in cash on June 22, 2026, to holders of record of such common stock as of the close of business on June 5, 2026.
